decision.rationale: The plate fails to honor IR.sean.hair.center-cowlick because the hair silhouette is drawn as a smooth dome (flattened cap) with no visible upward tuft at the crown, which the rule explicitly forbids ('The cowlick reads as a small upward tuft, not a flattened cap or a smooth dome'). Additionally, IR.sean.motion.head-turn-9-frame-sequence is borderline: while this image is indeed frame 05 of the sequence, the rule describes it as the 'front-facing midpoint (cy-confidence flagged)', whereas the plate depicts a top-down/bird's-eye view looking directly down. IR.sean.face.eye-spacing-one-eye-width is borderline because the vertical positioning of the eyes is below the midline due to the extreme downward tilt, though the eye-width horizontal spacing itself is preserved. The line-only rules IR.sean.hair.dirty-blonde-color and IR.sean.face.blue-eyes are fully honored as the plate uses contour lines only with no color or iris fill.
